{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Flashing Knives leader
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Threshold: Stories from Cradle (novel)|Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The leader of the [[Flashing Knives]] is a tall and gangly [[Underlord]] with crimson slash Goldsigns across his eyes.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Flashing Knives leader]] carries twin knives that shine with silver [[aura]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
